docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRICE, CAROL L AS TO DEFENDANT SMILAND & CHESTER, FKA SMILAND & KHACHIGIAN COHEN, ALBERT SOKOL, STACY DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-20-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-18-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-05-2008
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT SOKOL, STACY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT VIA FEDERAL EXPRESS, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRICE, CAROL L SERVED MAR-13-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COHEN, ALBERT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT VIA FEDERAL EXPRESS, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRICE, CAROL L SERVED MAR-13-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SMILAND & CHESTER, FKA SMILAND & KHACHIGIAN

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE AND AS TO ENTIRE ACTION. REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE WAS PREVIOUSLY FILED AND ENTERED ON 01/29/08 AS TO DEFT. STACY SOKOL. THIS REQUEST HAS NO EFFECT ON THE DISMISSAL OF DEFT. STACY SOKOL. AS TO DEFENDANT SMILAND & CHESTER, FKA SMILAND & KHACHIGIAN COHEN, ALBERT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-20-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
